text:
Sure, why don't you just read me one?

There was once a boy named Oliver. He enjoyed riding his bike. One day he saw a bird sit on a branch. He went over and tapped it once.

The bird flew away. Oliver shouted.

A squirrel ran along the tree.

Oliver smiled. That's sweet. He whistled.

The squirrel paused. Thief. Oliver laughed. He ran fast.

The squirrel climbed up. Oliver chased him.

Now Oliver ran fast too. He jumped tall buildings. Birds flew away.

They stopped at the top. Oliver saw nothing.

He dove. Fell.

He woke up next to Daisy. A puppy.

He chased. Found her. She scurried.

He sat. He cried.

Daisy rubbed his nose.

What happened? she asked.

He fell. You scared me.

She hugged. Sleep.

That night stars twinkled.

That's okay. sleep.

One day a cat rescued him.

He jumped onto a branch.
